name: Overwatch File 04: Fareeha Amari
description:
[Credit to: SoraaaaA]

Basic Profile & Appearance

Name: Fareeha “Pharah” Amari

Age: 32 in Overwatch 1; 34 in Overwatch 2 ￼

Ethnicity & Background:

• Daughter of Ana Amari (Egyptian Overwatch sniper) and Sam English (Indigenous Canadian) ￼

• Half-Egyptian, half-Indigenous Canadian; inscribed with Egyptian symbolism and skin references (e.g. Raindancer/Skinner Thunderbird) ￼

Physical Features:

• Height: ~5′11′′ (~180 cm), athletic build ￼

• Dark brown skin, shoulder-length black hair with gold beads & braids ￼

• Dark brown eyes; Eye of Horus tattoo under her right eye ￼

Attire & Armor:

• Wears Raptora Mark VI combat armor with winged thrusters, primarily blue with gold accents; Overwatch 2 adds white highlights and a clearer visor ￼

• Helmet features transparent visor shaped like a falcon’s beak and decorative wing fins ￼

⸻

🧠 Personality & Relationships

• Disciplined, duty-driven with a “Captain America–type” sense of justice

• Strives to honor her parents’ legacy and protect innocents ￼

• Sexuality revealed as lesbian in a 2023 Overwatch 2 Pride short story ￼

• Strong, solid bond with father; a cooler distance with mother Ana, who initially opposed her military ambitions ￼

⸻

⚙️ Weapons & Abilities

1. Rocket Launcher

• Fires high-damage explosive rockets with splash radius ￼

2. Jump Jet

• Grants vertical burst; restores Hover Jets fuel and allows slight overfuel ￼

3. Hover Jets (Passive)

• Allows sustained hovering with fuel; vertical lift of ~4.66 m/s; audible to foes, can be tactically toggled ￼

4. Jet Dash (Overwatch 2 secondary)

• Horizontal boost with cooldown, enabling quick repositioning ￼

5. Concussive Blast

• Knockback projectile affecting both enemies and Pharah, enabling environment kills or escapes; does no damage ⁠ ￼

6. Barrage (Ultimate)

• Immobilized rapid-fire rocket stream capable of devastating area control; needs support and setup

7. Role Passive

• Damage inflicted temporarily reduces enemy healing (–25% non-tanks, –12.5% tanks) for 2 sec ￼

⸻

📜 Lore & Team Role

• Backstory: Born into a legacy of soldiers, Pharah followed Overwatch sniper Ana; joined Egyptian Army, then Helix Security safeguarding AI under the Giza Plateau ￼

• In the event “Mission Statement”, after her commander’s death by rogue AI “Anubis”, she takes command to destroy the threat ￼

• Appears in “New Blood” fighting Talon, partners with Reaper’s Cassidy, declines joining Overwatch until later defending Busan ￼

• In Overwatch 2’s Pride short, clearly depicted as a confident lesbian ￼

Team Role & Synergy:

• Role: Damage (DPS) hero specializing in area denial and aerial harassment ￼

• Strengths:

• Excellent aerial pressure, synergy with airborne support like Mercy (damage boost, aerial heal) ￼

• Ideal against grouped enemies or those weak to explosive/projectile damage ￼

• Weaknesses:

• Vulnerable to hitscan snipers (e.g. Soldier: 76, Cassidy, Widowmaker) when airborne ￼

⸻

👍 Likes & Quirks

• Loves dogs, especially chihuahuas; keen on one as a pet ￼

• Enjoys basketball; highly curious as a child ￼

• Resilient and strong – in lore and gameplay she embodies resolve and protective intent

Visual & Color Design

• Armor Hue: Deep purple plating with neon-lilac undertones, glowing with an eerie internal aura ￼.

• Face & Helmet: Her face appears pale-purple, glowing with completely white eyes devoid of pupils—like she’s possessed ￼.

• Veins & Glow: Dark, pulsating veins emerge around her face and neck, often highlighted in videos—suggesting a corrupt energy .

• Aura Effect: Subtle purple particles swirl around her shoulders and thrusters, giving a spectral presence not seen in other skins ￼.

⸻

🛡 Armor Accents & Silhouette

• Retains Raptor
creator: IDontKnow125
